headline: Strong Q1 Earnings Lift Altria Stock but Limited Upside Ahead
summary: Altria (NYSE:MO) has staged one of the most surprising rebounds in the consumer defensive sector. After bottoming near $58.19 in November 2025, the stock has ripped back to $72.65, posting a 28.09% year-to-date gain. After a strong Q1 2026 print and reaffirmed guidance, the question is whether the run has more room. Our 24/7 Wall ... Strong Q1 Earnings Lift Altria Stock but Limited Upside Ahead

headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Bullish on Altria Stock?
summary: Altria has underperformed the S&P 500 Index over the past year, but analysts are fairly upbeat about the stock’s future prospects.
